repo.description: NeoTerm - The NEO Terminal Emulator Application For All Type Of OS With Variety Of Packages. Written In NEO Programming Language (NeoLang).

terms.context_snippet: [NeoTerm](https://github.com/neoterm/neoterm) is a powerful terminal emulator designed for all major operating systems, including Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, and Linux.
